next_steps: For #7c-eval shadow-eval --from-reports: this rerun blob can serve as the face-side --face-current-report once a paired --face-candidate-report is produced from a candidate ONNX run. For #5-bootstrap: the matching delta on the western fixture confirms the #2-family bootstrap is actually altering wo_raw face match outcomes downstream, validating the bootstrap-then-recall flow. No threshold change implied (matching landed in the low_lower band by design, not above match_lower).
non_goals: Not a candidate ONNX A/B (no candidate ONNX exists; #7b-train has not produced one since c09cad7 smoke).
Not a full-state-snapshot baseline replacement -- the parent baseline remains canonical.
Not a Precision/Recall labelled run (that is tools/eval_pr.py + tests/fixtures/face/baseline/MANIFEST.json, separate workflow).
reproducer: cd /root/F1-photo && python3 tools/eval_distribution.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:18799 --admin-user smoke_admin --admin-pwd smoke-admin-pwd-12345 --photos-glob "tests/fixtures/face/baseline/**/*.jpg" --report-path /tmp/2-face-rerun-2026-04-29.json --psql-bin ./bundled-pg/bin/psql --pg-host 127.0.0.1 --pg-port 55444 --pg-user f1photo --pg-db f1photo_prod --pg-pwd smokepwd
verdict_explanation: Detection engine (SCRFD + COCO YOLOv8) shows zero drift across the recent #2-family work: face_count / tool_count / device_count distributions and all three score quantile blocks are byte-identical to the parent baseline (sha 576b759fa72d8684). The matching half (photo_status, recognition_items_status) shows 2 cells of diff on exactly 1 of 42 photos: status moves from "unmatched" to "learning" (i.e. a face match landed in [low_lower=0.5, match_lower=0.62) low-confidence band rather than missing entirely). This is fully explained by gallery-state delta: the parent baseline was captured when the gallery did not contain the 119 incremental face embeddings injected by the #2-family Path A bootstrap (project f06e30b8 / id-photo-2a) and Path B reverse smoke (project f54d2a48 / id-photo-2a-reverse) that landed between the original face baseline capture and this rerun. With those 119 incremental embeddings now in the gallery, exactly 1 western face fixture photo (28b727d7...) finds a partial match below match_lower threshold. No detection engine drift; matching delta is data-state, not algorithmic.
why_run: Symmetric to the #2-tool zero-drift verification rerun (f741d6e). Confirms the face-side detection engine is stable across the 2026-04-27 -> 2026-04-29 work, and quantifies the matching-half impact of the #2-family gallery injection on a known reference fixture. Also unblocks the face-side input requirement of tools/shadow_eval.py --from-reports mode (previously gated per the 2026-04-29 handover doc) by producing a fresh face-side report.
